heading_content_part: Keyboard Style may disclose Non-personal data to third parties or allow third party to collect Non-personal data through their own embedded system. In order to deliver ads to you the third party advertisement companies may place or recognize unique cookies and identify non-personal
information. We use only Admob by Google. For more information please visit Google Privacy Policies.

Third party term and condition:Please note that your access to and use of the app may be subjected to certain third party term and condition and privacy policy. You recognize and agree that we are not liable for any such third party term and condition and any third party of your personal data.
Change network connectivity:This permission is used in Keyboard Style application setting and notification toolbars in order to change/check network connectivity.
Connect and disconnect from Wi-Fi:This permission is used in Keyboard Style application setting and notification toolbar in order to connect and disconnect from Wi-Fi.
